tools.name: identify_caller
tools.description: Checks the caller's phone number to identify if they are a new patient, returning patient, share a family line, or are recovering from a dropped call.

phone_number.description: The caller's phone number. If not provided, the backend will attempt to detect it from call metadata headers.

tools.name: get_practitioners
tools.description: Lists all doctors, their specialties, and clinic branch locations. Use this for general queries or triage.

specialty.description: Optional specialty to filter by (e.g., 'General Medicine', 'Pediatrics', 'Dermatology').

clinic_id.description: Optional clinic branch ID to filter by (1 for Downtown, 2 for Westside).

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Checks if a specific doctor/practitioner is available at a given date and time.

practitioner_id.description: The unique ID of the doctor/practitioner.

tools.name: search_earliest_slot
tools.description: Searches across all doctors and clinic branches to find the earliest available 30-minute appointment slot.

specialty.description: Optional specialty to filter by (e.g., 'General Medicine').

clinic_id.description: Optional clinic branch ID to filter by.

start_from.description: Optional ISO 8601 start time to search from (defaults to current time).

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Books a new appointment. You must capture the caller's first and last name before calling this.

clinic_id.description: The ID of the clinic branch.

start_time.description: The ISO 8601 start time of the slot.

idempotency_key.description: A unique UUID or string generated per booking attempt to prevent double submission.

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Reschedules an existing appointment to a new date and time. Checks if a fee applies.

appointment_id.description: The ID of the appointment to reschedule.

new_start_time.description: The new requested ISO 8601 start time.

tools.name: cancel_appointment
tools.description: Cancels an existing appointment. Checks if a fee applies.

appointment_id.description: The ID of the appointment to cancel.
